snippets.comment: Online hybrid class. Only 2 "lectures" posted over 7 weeks, were just videos from the online textbook. Had to teach myself chapter 6 before hearing mid term was three chapters. Not trying to teach myself this level of math.

Great teacher and good class. Lectures made sense and made the homework easy. We had about 10 questions per class and I know other classes have about 2 or 3 so 10 is a lot! But the extra homework makes the tests easier. If you try you will pass.
I was expecting hard class cause math is hard. I was surprised it wasnt bad. Mrs k is very nice person and helped me alot. Take this class!
Mrs k is the best! She helps you understand math.

Pop quizzes every lecture (all or nothing), spends lecture making fun of a student because they forgot how to do something instead of teaching new material, gives 30+ homework problems every night, barely gives partial credit on exams, exam questions are purposely chosen as the hardest problems from
